item.title: Please welcome our new admins
item.author: Tim Schilling
item.description: The Django Commons admin team has grown! Read more to find out about the team and look into our future.

item.title: We're recruiting new admins!
item.author: Lacey Henschel
item.description: The Django Commons admin team is recruiting new members. If you're interested in being an admin of Django Commons, please read.
